allow: Bash(RITA_ENV=development PYTHONPATH=src python -m alembic revision --autogenerate -m "add instruments table")
Bash(RITA_ENV=development PYTHONPATH=src python -m alembic upgrade head)

Bash(RITA_ENV=development PYTHONPATH=src python -c "from rita.database import SessionLocal; from rita.repositories.instrument import InstrumentRepository; db = SessionLocal\(\); repo = InstrumentRepository\(db\); rows = repo.read_all\(\); print\([\(r.instrument_id, r.name, r.is_available\) for r in rows]\); db.close\(\)")

Bash(RITA_ENV=development PYTHONPATH=src python -c "import datetime as _dt; from rita.database import SessionLocal; from rita.repositories.instrument import InstrumentRepository; from rita.schemas.instrument import Instrument as I; db=SessionLocal\(\); repo=InstrumentRepository\(db\); now=_dt.datetime.now\(_dt.timezone.utc\); [repo.upsert\(I\(instrument_id=x[0],name=x[1],exchange=x[2],country_code=x[3],lot_size=x[4],is_available=False,created_at=now\)\) for x in [\('NIFTY','Nifty 50','NSE','IN',75\),\('BANKNIFTY','Bank Nifty','NSE','IN',30\),\('NVDA','Nvidia','NASDAQ','US',None\),\('ASML','ASML','AMS','NL',None\)]]; print\('seeded:', [\(r.instrument_id,r.is_available\) for r in repo.read_all\(\)]\); db.close\(\)")
Bash(RITA_ENV=development PYTHONPATH=src python -c "from rita.api.v1.observability import router; print\('Router loaded OK, routes:', [r.path for r in router.routes]\)")
Bash(RITA_ENV=development PYTHONPATH=src python -c "from rita.api.v1.observability import active_instrument; print\(active_instrument\(\)\)")
